# Google Maps JavaScript Sample

## hiding-features

This example demonstrates using map styling to toggle the visibility of business points of interest (POIs) and public transit icons on the map.

## Setup

### Before starting run:

`npm i`

### Run an example on a local web server

`cd samples/hiding-features`
`npm start`

### Build an individual example

`cd samples/hiding-features`
`npm run build`

From 'samples':

`npm run build --workspace=hiding-features/`

### Build all of the examples.

From 'samples':

`npm run build-all`

### Run lint to check for problems

`cd samples/hiding-features`
`npx eslint index.ts` 

## Feedback

For feedback related to this sample, please open a new issue on
[GitHub](https://github.com/googlemaps-samples/js-api-samples/issues).
